questions.question: Define voltage, current, power and energy along with their SI units.
Define electrical resistance and explain the factors affecting resistance.
Three resistors 10Ω, 20Ω and 30Ω are connected in series. Find the equivalent resistance.
Find the equivalent resistance of two resistors 6Ω and 3Ω connected in parallel.
Define inductance and explain the unit of inductance.
Define capacitance and state the unit of capacitance.
Explain the working principle of a wattmeter.
Define magnetomotive force (MMF) and state its unit.
Define magnetic field strength and explain its significance.
Define magnetic reluctance and compare it with electrical resistance.
Explain the B-H curve and hysteresis phenomenon.
Calculate the MMF required to produce a magnetic flux in a series magnetic circuit.
State Kirchhoff’s current law and Kirchhoff’s voltage law.
Differentiate between ideal and practical voltage sources.
Convert a voltage source of 12V with series resistance of 4Ω into an equivalent current source.
Explain the steps involved in mesh analysis.
Explain nodal analysis for solving electrical circuits.
Convert a star connected network into an equivalent delta network.
State Thevenin’s theorem and explain its application.
State the condition for maximum power transfer in a DC circuit.
Explain how alternating voltage is generated.
Define RMS value of AC current and derive its expression.
Explain phasor representation of sinusoidal quantities.
Analyze a series RLC circuit and determine the impedance.
Explain series resonance in an RLC circuit.
Explain the relationship between line and phase voltage in star connection.
Explain voltage and current relations in delta connected systems.
Derive the EMF equation of a single phase transformer.
Explain open circuit test and short circuit test of a transformer.
Explain the working principle of a three phase induction motor.
